config.html_body:
Equipment Power Simulator

Generates realistic power consumption data into power_consumption table. Select equipment type to simulate different transient behaviors (startup spike, ramp, steady oscillation, shutdown).

32
1200
7
100%
-
config.css: *{box-sizing:border-box;font-family:system-ui} #app{max-width:900px} .desc{font-size:13px;color:#666} .controls{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin:16px 0} .ctrl{background:#f8fafc;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:6px} .ctrl.full{grid-column:span 3} .ctrl label{display:block;font-size:10px;color:#666;margin-bottom:3px;text-transform:uppercase} .ctrl input[type=range]{width:calc(100% - 50px)} .ctrl span{float:right;font-weight:700;font-size:13px} .ctrl select{width:100%;padding:6px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px} .preview{background:#0f172a;border-radius:6px;padding:12px;margin:12px 0;min-height:80px} .preview canvas{width:100%;height:80px} .actions{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;margin:8px 0} button{padding:8px 20px;background:#2563eb;color:white;border:none;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px} button:disabled{opacity:0.5} #status{font-size:12px;color:#666} .log{font-family:monospace;font-size:11px;background:#0f172a;color:#e2e8f0;padding:12px;border-radius:6px;max-height:300px;overflow-y:auto;white-space:pre-wrap;margin-top:8px}
